sections.instruction:
Nisbiy olmoshlar nisbiy ergash gaplarda qo'llaniladi. Nisbiy ergash gaplar yangi gap boshlashsiz biror narsa haqida qo'shimcha ma'lumot beradi.
_That man over there is Bill Gates. He started Microsoft._
_That man over there, **who**'s called Bill Gates, started Microsoft._
sections.instruction_ru:
Относительные местоимения используются в относительных придаточных предложениях. Относительные придаточные дают дополнительную информацию о чём-либо, без необходимости начинать новое предложение.
_That man over there is Bill Gates. He started Microsoft._
_That man over there, **who**'s called Bill Gates, started Microsoft._

cells: _What's the name of the man **who** created the Internet?_
cells_uz: _What's the name of the man **who** created the Internet?_
cells_ru: _What's the name of the man **who** created the Internet?_

cells: _The experiment **which** worked was the last one._
cells_uz: _The experiment **which** worked was the last one._
cells_ru: _The experiment **which** worked was the last one._

cells: _This is the town **where** Albert Einstein was born._
cells_uz: _This is the town **where** Albert Einstein was born._
cells_ru: _This is the town **where** Albert Einstein was born._

cells: _That's the man **whose** sister discovered a new planet._
cells_uz: _That's the man **whose** sister discovered a new planet._
cells_ru: _That's the man **whose** sister discovered a new planet._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Hayvonlarga shaxsiyat berilganda **who** ishlatishimiz mumkin.
✓ _Our dog, **who**'s called Benji, is eight years old._

• Nisbiy olmosh mavjud bo'lganda, egani/to'ldiruvchini takrorlamang.
✗ _What's the name of the man **who he** created the World Wide Web?_
✗ _This is the experiment **which** I'm doing **it** at the moment._
tip.translation_ru:
• Мы можем использовать **who** для животных, когда даём им личность.
✓ _Our dog, **who**'s called Benji, is eight years old._

• Если есть относительное местоимение, не повторяйте подлежащее/дополнение.
✗ _What's the name of the man **who he** created the World Wide Web?_
✗ _This is the experiment **which** I'm doing **it** at the moment._

sections.instruction:
Aniqlamaydigan nisbiy ergash gaplar qo'shimcha ma'lumot beradi. Gapning ma'nosi nisbiy ergash gapsiz ham to'liq bo'ladi.
_That man over there, **who** is called Bill Gates, started Microsoft._
Nisbiy ergash gapni olib tashlaymiz:
_That man over there started Microsoft._
sections.instruction_ru:
Неопределительные относительные придаточные дают дополнительную информацию. Предложение имеет смысл и без относительного придаточного.
_That man over there, **who** is called Bill Gates, started Microsoft._
Если убрать относительное придаточное:
_That man over there started Microsoft._

cells: _This program, **which** is totally free, protects your computer against viruses._
cells_uz: _This program, **which** is totally free, protects your computer against viruses._
cells_ru: _This program, **which** is totally free, protects your computer against viruses._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
Aniqlamaydigan nisbiy ergash gaplarda vergul ishlatamiz.
✓ _Carl, **whose** sister is famous, is a friend of mine._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы используем запятые с неопределительными относительными придаточными.
✓ _Carl, **whose** sister is famous, is a friend of mine._

sections.instruction:
Aniqlovchi nisbiy ergash gaplar juda muhim ma'lumot beradi. Agar aniqlovchi nisbiy ergash gapni olib tashlasaklar, gap ma'nosini yo'qotadi.
Tasavvur qiling, xonada ko'p odam bor. Ulardan bittasigina ko'k ko'ylak kiygan.
_The person **who** is wearing the blue shirt started Microsoft._
Nisbiy ergash gapni olib tashlasak, qaysi odam ekanini bilmaymiz.
✗ _The person started Microsoft._
sections.instruction_ru:
Определительные относительные придаточные дают очень важную информацию. Если убрать определительное относительное придаточное, предложение теряет смысл.
Представьте, что в комнате много людей. Только один из них в синей рубашке.
_The person **who** is wearing the blue shirt started Microsoft._
Если убрать придаточное, мы не знаем, о каком человеке идёт речь.
✗ _The person started Microsoft._

cells: To define who or what we are talking about
_This is the TV **which** works. This is the TV **which** doesn't work._
cells_uz: Kim yoki nima haqida gapirayotganimizni aniqlashtirish uchun
_This is the TV **which** works. This is the TV **which** doesn't work._
cells_ru: Чтобы определить, о ком или о чём мы говорим
_This is the TV **which** works. This is the TV **which** doesn't work._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
• Aniqlovchi nisbiy ergash gaplarda vergul ishlatmaymiz.

• Aniqlovchi ergash gaplarda **who** va **which** o'rniga **that** ishlatishimiz mumkin.
✓ _Did you see the programme about the woman **who** invented Tippex?_
✓ _Did you see the programme about the woman **that** invented Tippex?_
tip.translation_ru:
• Мы не используем запятые с определительными относительными придаточными.

• Мы можем использовать **that** вместо **who** и **which** в определительных придаточных.
✓ _Did you see the programme about the woman **who** invented Tippex?_
✓ _Did you see the programme about the woman **that** invented Tippex?_
